rulings.Case Title: SUSAN JEFFRIES-FITZGERALD VS. REN VOLPE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Ren Volpe'S Demurrer To 2nd Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 27, 2017 line 1. Defendant Ren Volpe'S Demurrer To 2nd Amended Complaint OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract states single primary right to have the premises returned at conclusion of the tenancy in the same condition as rented by the tenants at the inception of the lease, normal wear and tear excepted, as provided in paragraph 23 of the Lease.= (501/CPK)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN JEFFRIES-FITZGERALD VS. REN VOLPE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Ren Volpe'S Motion To Strike 2nd Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 27, 2017 line 1. Defendant Ren Volpe'S Motion To Strike 2nd Amended Complaint GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The Motion is granted as to the request to strike DOES 51-100. Motion is otherwise denied. = (501/CPK)

rulings.Case Title: CHRIS NORRIS ET AL VS. CALIBER HOME LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 27, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT BRECKENRIDGE PROPERTY FUND 2016 DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED. No opposition filed. Demurrer to the causes of action for contract and fraud is sustained without leave to amend. No contract is alleged between the parties and no misrepresentations attributable to the moving Defendant. Demurrer to the cause of action for declaratory relief is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to re-allege this cause of action in good faith only if Plaintiff is able to assert viable causes of action against co-Defendant Caliber Home Loans, Inc. Amended Complaint shall be filed in accordance with the deadlines associated with the ruling on co-Defendant Caliber Home Loans, Inc. demurrer heard on July 13, 2017.= (501/CPK)
